exceljs.label: ExcelJS
executionModels: Streams rows directly to the Node writable via ExcelJS WorkbookWriter.

goWasm.label: Go/WASM
executionModels: Accumulates workbook state inside Go/WASM and emits ZIP bytes during finalization callbacks.

rustWasm.label: Rust/WASM
executionModels: Accumulates workbook state inside Rust/WASM and returns final workbook bytes to Node at finalize time.
